dc_description: A lakeside scene at dusk or early evening with calm water reflecting a pink-blue sky. Several small motorboats are moored across the middle distance. Dark reeds frame the lower left and right edges, with a wooden railing or bench in the foreground. A tall signpost stands near the right side; the sign appears to reference the Comune di Montefiascone, Lago di Bolsena, and “CARP-FISHING.” Distant low hills and shoreline are visible on the horizon, and tree leaves hang from the top edge.
novel_visual_observations: The sign includes Italian text and appears to state a fishing period from July to May. A single thin vertical post or stake rises from the water near the center foreground.
location_name: Via Dante Alighieri, Le Coste, Montefiascone
rich_context: Poste Italiane, 19, Via Dante Alighieri, Le Mosse, Le Coste, Montefiascone, Viterbo, Lazio, 01027, Italia
